title: Unit, Property, Replay, Headless SDL, Render, and Playtest Evidence · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed playtest review reconstructs unit, property, replay, headless sdl, render, and playtest evidence from revision, seed, input frames, simulation snapshots, draw records, audio cues, accessibility settings, profiles, package artifacts, and release evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for risk-layered automated and human game test suite after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Test vector, wrap, time, input, state, score, collision, spawn, and migration invariants with fixed fixtures.
Generate bounded cases for wrap, collision symmetry, conservation, reconciliation, replay, and invalid input and retain smallest failures.
Use dummy video and audio drivers for adapter integration while labeling missing window, GPU, timing, device, and sensory evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Pure Unit Tests · changed case · Review Pure Unit Tests
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Asteroids team handles case 2295 during an offline cross-platform release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to layer pure unit and property tests, deterministic replay, headless SDL integration, render contracts, changed defects, and manual accessibility playtests; test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases; then run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Test vector, wrap, time, input, state, score, collision, spawn, and migration invariants with fixed fixtures.

stimulus.title: Playtest Accessibility case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review Asteroids team handles case 9485 during a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling. Build deterministic Python evidence to layer pure unit and property tests, deterministic replay, headless SDL integration, render contracts, changed defects, and manual accessibility playtests; retain player goal, revision, Python, pygame-ce, SDL, fixture, seed, input trace, viewport, and result identity; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Run structured tasks with varied players and devices, capture barriers and observations ethically, repair, and retest.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Automated accessibility checks can certify game playability.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run structured tasks with varied players and devices, capture barriers and observations ethically, repair, and retest. Artifact under review: risk-layered automated and human game test suite.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Playtest Accessibility, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Playtest Accessibility record says risk-layered automated and human game test suite looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Playtest Accessibility.

For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient high-frame-rate happy path, omit revision, seed, input and time trace, units, seams, device changes, entity reconciliation, multichannel cues, accessibility settings, failures, recovery, and desktop transfer, then accept a playable animation as Asteroids proof. This does not satisfy Playtest Accessibility for risk-layered automated and human game test suite.

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Playtest Accessibility
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Playtest Accessibility: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review Asteroids team handles case 9053 during a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling. Build deterministic Python evidence to layer pure unit and property tests, deterministic replay, headless SDL integration, render contracts, changed defects, and manual accessibility playtests; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Run structured tasks with varied players and devices, capture barriers and observations ethically, repair, and retest.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Playtest Accessibility.
steps.why: Retrieving Playtest Accessibility through the concrete risk-layered automated and human game test suite case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Playtest Accessibility, keep Playtest Accessibility connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Run structured tasks with varied players and devices, capture barriers and observations ethically, repair, and retest.
